# opnsense_openvpn_static_key (Data Source)

OpenVPN static keys are pre-shared TLS or static keys used by OpenVPN instances.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "opnsense_openvpn_static_key" "example" {
  id = "<uuid>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description for this static key.
- `key` (String, Sensitive) The static key payload.
- `mode` (String) The static-key mode.
